title: F1 2026 Explained: New Rules, New Engines  and a Possible Downfall? #automobile #f1technology
description:
The Formula 1 2026 regulations will launch a completely new era of F1. New engine rules, major aerodynamic changes, sustainable fuel innovations, and a potential shake-up of the competitive order.

But will this revolution bring closer racing and new legends… or create another era of domination and unexpected downfall?

In this video we break down:

The new F1 2026 technical regulations

The new power unit changes and hybrid system

Which teams could dominate

Which teams are at serious risk

title: Every F1 Grand Slam of the 21st Century So Far
description:
A Grand Chelem - or Grand Slam - is the rarest achievement in Formula 1. Just 27 drivers have done it in the sport's history - and only 14 of those have achieved it more than once. Join us as we look back over the 24 times it's happened since the turn of the millennium in 2000!

title: Barcelona Shakedown EXPLAINED: Every F1 2026 Team’s Real Situation
description:
F1 2026 finally hit the track for real in Barcelona – and the first five days of running have given us a very early look at the new era.

On paper, Lewis Hamilton was fastest of the week for Ferrari with a 1:16.348.

But when you dig into the data, it’s Mercedes – with 500 laps on the W17 – and the power unit manufacturers who really stand out.

In this video, we go team by team through the full Barcelona shakedown:

• What each team actually did on track
• How many laps they completed

description:
This is Formula 1 like you’ve never seen it before. The @dutchdronegods follow Max Verstappen’s brand new @redbullracing  RB20 F1 car for a full lap of Silverstone’s Grand Prix Circuit. The world first uninterrupted FPV one shot was captured by a manually piloted custom built drone, designed specifically for the challenge of keeping up with the car at speeds of over 300kph.
